title: Astrid's Weapons
description: Adds Multiple New Unique Weapons In Game
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/653d4c6fb2880c7fe9d3720e37656037a3f2412b.webp)
![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32bc88b91003b6a9b78990fc1feebaf3b62f154a.webp)
This Modds Adds Some Unique Weapons, None that is in the vanilla game, All new weapons to make and kill mobs with and rule the minecraft blocky world
